title: angolluma commutata
intro: Angolluma commutata, also known as the desert broom or desert broom orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Angolluma commutata include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or a decoction for herbal remedies, and it is also used as a component in traditional medicine formulations in some regions.
